## What and why

## Scope

## Verification
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Type check
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Build (when applicable)
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_project_context.py`

## Product/architecture check
- [ ] Reduces or does not increase cognitive load
- [ ] Preserves user control and explainability
- [ ] No silent architecture/domain changes
- [ ] ADR added if required

## Handover
- [ ] Current state updated
- [ ] Module/task JSON updated
- [ ] Session log and next task updated
- [ ] Product Owner digest updated
